operator definition abort. Detect mcoplib availability and skip
fallback registration to let mcoplib provide the ops.")

Bash(git commit -m "fix\(rotary\): use ops.rotary_embedding directly with correct head_size

ROOT CAUSE: RotaryEmbeddingFL slices query to query_rot[..., :rotary_dim]
before calling rotary_embedding_maca. The old impl delegated to
obj.forward_cuda\(\) which uses self.head_size \(256 for Qwen3.5\).
But the actual tensor only has rotary_dim=64 elements per head.
The kernel then does out-of-bounds memory access → data corruption → garbled output.

FIX: Call ops.rotary_embedding directly with head_size=query.shape[-1]
\(the actual rotary_dim\), matching the sliced tensor''s real shape.")

Bash(git commit -m "fix\(rotary\): delegate to forward_cuda for correct head_size handling

Root cause: RotaryEmbeddingFL previously sliced query to rotary_dim then
passed to rotary_embedding_maca which called obj.forward_cuda with the
sliced tensor. forward_cuda uses self.head_size \(256 for Qwen3.5\) but
the sliced tensor only has rotary_dim=64 per head → kernel OOB access.

Fix: Simplify the dispatch to pass \(obj, positions, query, key\) directly
and let the MetaX impl call obj.forward_cuda which correctly handles
slicing, stride, and dtype internally.

Only MetaX backend is updated; other backends keep old interface for now.")
